arts.ttl: Man City vs Inter: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Matchday 1 of the 2024/25 Champions League is arguably highlighted by Wednesday night's clash between Manchester City and Inter at the Etihad. Rodri is in line to make his first start of the season on Wednesday, while Phil Foden could come back into the side after failing to feature at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Inter Boss Simone Inzaghi Waxes Lyrical About His Man City Counterpart Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Serie A champions Inter take a daunting-looking trip to the Etihad Stadium to face Manchester City in their opening Champions League fixture. Simone Inzaghi talked to the press in the build-up, naming his Citizens counterpart Pep Guardiola 'the best coach around.' The post Inter Boss Simone Inzaghi Waxes Lyrical About His Man City Counterpart Pep Guardiola appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Man City 115 FFP charges latest amid current PSR status claim and Rodri future 'pledge'
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City news ahead of the third day of the club's independent hearing amid 115 charges from the Premier League for alleged FFP breaches.

arts.ttl: I can be Man City's next Jeremy Doku - I like to humiliate my opponents
arts.sum: Manchester City have a strong record of developing exciting wingers like Leroy Sane and Jeremy Doku. Now there is another youngster looking to make his mark.

arts.ttl: How to buy Oasis-inspired Man City kit designed by Noel Gallagher
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news and gossip as fans are now able to buy the Oasis-inspired fourth kit released by City last week

arts.ttl: Rodri admits players could 'strike' over congested football calendar
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has admitted that players are "close" to going on strike over the increasingly congested football calendar. The expansion of the UEFA Champions League this season has added between two and four extra games, with some teams needing to play ten times to reach the last 16 in the new format.

arts.ttl: When is Manchester City - Inter Milan? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Manchester City and Inter Milan will take place on Wednesday, September 18, at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT. What time does Manchester City - Inter Milan start?
